title: ISO 27001 Control Seed Record
description: Schema for a single control row in the controls-2022.json or controls-2013.json seed files.

control_id.description: Annex A control identifier (e.g. '5.1' for 2022, 'A.5.1.1' for 2013).

version.description: ISO 27001 edition this control belongs to.

name.description: Short name of the control as it appears in the standard.

theme.description: Control theme / domain (e.g. 'Organizational', 'Technological', 'A.5 Information security policies').

description.description: Normative control statement from the standard.

control_type.description: One or more control type classifications.

attributes.description: ISO 27001:2022 attribute tags (null or absent for 2013 controls).

related_controls.description: Control IDs of related controls within the same version.

new_in_2022.description: True only for the 11 controls introduced in the 2022 edition.

iso_clause_refs.description: Mandatory ISMS clause IDs (4–10) that reference this control.
